document_summary: SalaryExpert salary benchmark data for professors in China. Average professor salary is 323,032 CNY/yr, with entry-level at 228,864 CNY and senior-level at 405,245 CNY. Liu's actual salary of 961,710 CNY is nearly 3x the average, demonstrating extraordinary compensation.

snippets.subject: Professor salary benchmark
snippets.reasoning: Average professor salary in China of 323,032 CNY serves as benchmark against Liu's 961,710 CNY salary.

snippets.subject: Professor salary benchmark
snippets.reasoning: Entry-level professor salary of 228,864 CNY, showing the lower range of professor compensation.

snippets.text: The average professor gross salary in China is \(323,032 or an equivalent hourly rate of\) 155. In addition, they earn an average bonus of \(11,080. Salary estimates based on salary since data collected directly from employers and anonymous employees in China. An entry level professor (1- 3 years of experience) earns an average salary of\) 228,864. On the other end, a senior level professor (8+ years of experience) earns an average salary of\) 405,245.
snippets.subject: Professor salary benchmark
snippets.reasoning: Comprehensive salary benchmark: average 323,032 CNY, entry 228,864 CNY, senior 405,245 CNY. Liu's 961,710 CNY is 2.37x the senior level.

snippets.text: Data powered by ERI's Salary Expert Database
